things.name: Historic Centre & Cathedral
things.description: Stunning 16th-century cathedral with twin yellow towers and surrounding colonial plazas

things.name: Instituto Cultural Cabanas
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage former orphanage with José Clemente Orozco's powerful ceiling murals

things.name: Tlaquepaque Arts & Crafts Village
things.description: Charming suburb known as the crafts capital of Mexico with ceramics, blown glass and mariachi

things.name: Tequila Town Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO-listed town in the blue agave fields where tequila has been distilled since the 1600s

things.name: Lake Chapala
things.description: Mexico's largest freshwater lake set in the Sierra Madre foothills with lakeside villages

things.name: Mercado San Juan de Dios
things.description: Latin America's largest indoor market with three floors of regional food, crafts and clothing

things.name: Barranca de Huentitan
things.description: Deep canyon on the edge of the city with hiking trails and views of the Rio Santiago

things.name: Guadalajara Zoo
things.description: Major zoological park bordering the Barranca with over 360 species of animals

things.name: Museo Regional de Guadalajara
things.description: Regional archaeology and history museum in a 17th-century seminary building

things.name: Zona Rosa & Chapultepec Avenue
things.description: Guadalajara's trendiest nightlife and restaurant strip with rooftop bars and boutique cafes
